top_signals.title: Treasuries Erase Drop on Signs of Progress Toward Ending War
top_signals.summary: US government bonds snapped an earlier decline to notch gains as oil retreated on hopes that an agreement to end the US war in the Middle East will be reached soon.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Southern Copper plans $319M Cuajone mine overhaul
top_signals.summary: Peru mine upgrades aim to cut costs, sustain output and improve efficiency as ore grades decline at key sites.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Has the NYC Ferry Righted the Ship?
top_signals.summary: Since its 2017 launch, the NYC Ferry has been scrutinized over its finances. But lately, the city-run fleet says it’s seeing record ridership, social media buzz and its lowest subsidy-per-rider yet.  (Source: Bloomberg)
